title: Understanding The Implication and The Impact Of E-Invoicing
subtitle: A 1-day HRD Corp-claimable digital skills workshop for improving productivity with e-invoicing implementation.
whyThisMatters: Understanding The Implication and The Impact Of E-Invoicing helps office teams use e-invoicing implementation with more structure, accuracy, and confidence. Participants practise Know how e-Invoice system works technically; and, Know how to come out your business e-Invoice implementation project plan, and Module 1: Introduction so digital tools become easier to apply to reports, data, communication, and everyday work output.
builtFor: Office teams using digital tools in daily work
Managers who want stronger productivity and reporting habits
Employees who need practical confidence with workplace technology
walkAwayWith: Use the relevant tools or concepts with clearer purpose and structure.
Improve accuracy, productivity, and confidence in everyday tasks.
Apply practical workflows to workplace documents, data, or communication.
Build reusable habits that support better digital work.

modules.title: Know how e-Invoice system works technically; and
Know how to come out your business e-Invoice implementation project plan
Background for LHDN to develop e-Invoice system

methodologyCaption: Most of the session is hands-on: participants practise tasks, compare outputs, and refine workflows for their own roles.
sourceDoc: course/documents-markdown/UNDERSTANDING THE IMPLICATION AND THE IMPACT  OF E-INVOICING.md
